name: Recipe
description: A Workato recipe representing an automated workflow.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the recipe does.

folder_id.description: ID of the folder containing this recipe.

running.description: Whether the recipe is currently active and processing events.

trigger_application.description: The connector used for the recipe's trigger.

action_applications.description: List of connectors used in the recipe's actions.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the recipe was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the recipe was last updated.

stopped_at.description: Timestamp when the recipe was last stopped.

stop_cause.description: Reason the recipe was stopped, if applicable.
